_contract: Task registry for the cross-platform adapter seam. Each ops capability is defined ONCE as a task id with per-platform entrypoints. Callers (core commands, hooks, onboarding) invoke a task via the dispatcher (run.sh / run.ps1); the dispatcher resolves task id -> platform -> entrypoint and execs it, passing args through. Entrypoint paths are relative to this adapters/ directory. The 'python' entrypoint is the source of truth; 'bash' and 'powershell' are thin wrappers over it so behaviour is identical across runtimes. Add a new runtime by adding its key to each task; callers do not change.

inspect-repo.summary: Read-only audit of a target repo; emits a gap report (markdown) and JSON summary. Never modifies the target.

apply-brain.summary: Apply the brain to a destination: 'provision' a new brain into an empty dir, or 'adopt' into an existing repo (adopt defaults to dry-run; pass --apply to write). First arg selects the subcommand.

generate-capabilities.summary: Regenerate (or --check) a brain's 01-docs/CAPABILITIES.md from code (commands + manifest) so the capabilities map cannot drift. --write writes it; --check (default) diffs against disk and exits non-zero on drift.

docs-mesh.summary: Read-only docs anti-drift checks over a brain: relative-link and wikilink resolution, mermaid fence balance/safety, and freshness-stamp parsing. Exits non-zero if a hard check (links, mermaid balance) fails.

intent-gate.summary: CI intent gate: fail if a command directory exists under core/ or extensions/ with no matching row in the committed CAPABILITIES.md. Enforces 'a feature cannot land without the brain growing with it'.

emit-commands.summary: Emit each authored command (03-templates/agent-commands/{core,extensions}) to the standard agent discovery locations — .claude/skills, .github/skills, and .github/agents — so one source works across Claude Code and GitHub Copilot.

upgrade-brain.summary: Down-sync execution: reconcile a brain's enabled core modules to the hub's latest framework version, bumping framework_version + synced_from and preserving project extensions. Surfaces pre-existing (adopted:false) modules for manual review. Defaults to dry-run; pass --apply to write.
